DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on WED-AUG-30-2017. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS HEWLETT-PACKARD COMPANY, HP INC., and HEWLETT PACKARD ENTERPRISE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Defendants Hewlett-Packard Company, HP Inc., and Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company's demurrer to the first, second, third, fifth, and sixth causes of action is sustained for misjoinder of parties. Ms. Miller is granted leave to file a separate complaint against the HP defendants that will be deemed not barred by the statute of limitations so long as the new complaint does not include any new or different causes of action or allegations compared to the original complaint. Ms. Miller's allegations against the HP defendants do not arise "out of the same transaction, occurrence, or series of transactions or occurrences" that give rise to her allegations against defendants Snapfish, LLC and District Photo. (CCP 379(a). Ms. Miller's allegations against HP involve distinct alleged events carried out by distinct alleged actors during a separate period of time that resulted in a separate injury. Nor does any common question of law or fact exist among the parties. (Id.) Ms. Miller's argument that joinder is proper under CCP 379(c) is unpersuasive. Ms. Miller's complaint does not show, nor is it reasonably likely it could show, that there is doubt as to the person from whom Ms. Miller is entitled to redress. Rather, Ms. Miller's allegations against the HP defendants constitute a separate and distinct injury from the allegations against Snapfish and District Photo. Order signed in open court. Judge: Hon. Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings not reported. (504)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 504

Parties must provide their own court reporter. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
